title: Hemionitis feei
taxonomy: Hemionitis feei is classified as a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae, which belongs to the division Pteridophyta. This plant is a type of fern, commonly found in tropical regions. Hemionitis feei is native to Southeast Asia, where it grows in shaded and humid environments. The classification of Hemionitis feei is further divided into the genus Hemionitis, which comprises several species of ferns. Hemionitis feei is often cultivated for its ornamental value due to its attractive fronds and compact growth habit.
